2018May 20, 2018

🇨🇳 Beijing, China

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Beijing, China, May 20, 2018 -- May 25, 2018

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2018-05-beijing-china

23 Resolutions

985Plenary
Request digital twin manufacturing examples
SC4 invites its member countries, liaisons and other interested parties (i.e. OPC and MTConnect) to submit digital twin manufacturing examples, standards, technologies and use cases to the Convenor...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
984Plenary
Call for experts to JWG 24 and hold first meeting
SC 4 requests its TPM to coordinate with other ISO TPMs to identify all TCs/SCs that may have interest in submission of their standards for inclusion in the IEC CDD, including TC 29, TC 59/SC13, TC...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
983Plenary
Sponsor ICD application for KOIOS Master Data Limited
SC 4 has reviewed the application from KOIOS Master Data Limited to be assigned an International Code Designator and agrees to act as the "sponsoring authority."
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
982Plenary
Appoint Liaison Officers to ISO/TC 59/SC 13
SC 4 appoints Torbjorn Holm and Jean Brange as Liaison Officers to ISO/TC 59/SC 13 "Organization and digitization of information about buildings and civil engineering works, including building info...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
981Plenary
Establish Category A Liaison with Small Business Standards
SC 4 welcomes the application of the Small Business Standards organization (www.sbs-sme.eu) as a category A Liaison.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
980Plenary
Amend title of ISO 15926-4 ed2
SC 4 agrees to amend the title of ISO 15926-4 ed2 from "Initial reference data" to "Core reference data".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
979Plenary
Submit Committee Innovation Proposal for ISO 15926-4
SC 4 agrees to support the Committee Innovation Proposal for ISO 15926-4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
978Plenary
Submit proposed SC 4 Scope Change for CIB
SC 4 requests TC 184 to note the attached proposed draft new scope statement which will be subject to CIB after this meeting.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
977Plenary
Add experts to SC 4 Quality Committee
SC 4 requests each of its WG Convenors to nominate at least one of its experts to the SC 4 Quality Committee and to invite national bodies to review their membership on the Quality Committee.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
976Plenary
Approve development of ISO/DIS 29002 edition 2
SC4 approves development of ISO/DIS 29002. The document will consolidate all existing parts into a single document but will not expand the current scope of ISO 29002. The DIS will be submitted for ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
975Plenary
Submit ISO 8000-110 ed2 for DIS Ballot
SC 4 requests ISO CS to register the project as SDT 18 and its Secretariat to submit the document straight for DIS ballot. Target date for submission: 2019-02-28, Target date for publication: 2019-...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
974Plenary
Apply 48-month development track to ISO 8000-64
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 48 month development track to the ISO 8000-64 project.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
973Plenary
Request 9-month extension for ISO 10303-242 ed2
SC 4 requests the ISO TMB to grant a 9 month extension to ISO 10303-242 ed2 in accordance with the attached justification.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
972Plenary
Apply 8-week ballot duration to ISO 15926-14 NP
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 8 week ballot duration to the NP for ISO 15926-14.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
971Plenary
Apply 8-week ballot duration to ANSI QIF harvesting NP
SC 4 requests its Chair to convene a group representing WG 12, WG 15, and WG 16 to review the explanatory report on QIF harvesting submitted to Change Management and recommend whether to proceed to...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
970Plenary
Appoint Changsoo Lee as Quality Committee Deputy Convenor
SC 4 appoints Changsoo Lee as Deputy Convenor for the Quality Committee for a three year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
969Plenary
Appoint Anne-Francoise Cutting-Decelle as JWG 8 Convenor
SC 4 appoints Anne-Francoise Cutting-Decelle as Convenor for the JWG 08 "Joint ISO/TC 184/SC 4 - ISO/TC 184/SC 5 WG; Manufacturing process and management information" for a three year term, with ap...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
968Plenary
Reappoint Tim King as WG 13 Convenor
SC 4 appoints Tim King as Convenor for the WG 13 "Industrial Data Quality" for a further three year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
967Plenary
Reappoint Keith Hunten as WG 12 Convenor
SC 4 appoints Keith Hunten as Convenor for the WG 12, "STEP product modeling and resources" for a further three year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
966Plenary
Reappoint Paul van Exel as WG 3 and IF Convenor
SC 4 appoints Paul van Exel as Convenor for the WG 3 "Oil, Gas, Process and Power" and "Implementation Forum (IF)" for a further three year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that ca...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
